# `/deop` Command
Revokes operator status from a player.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Admin</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>No</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/deop <player: target>`

## Arguments
- `player`: target
